primitives.p: I said, "What if we start a shoe company?"
primitives.q: I wanted to help children without shoes.

primitives.p: We put this intention out to the world.
primitives.q: People showed up when we said we'd give a pair.

primitives.p: Damn it, we're going to do something about it.
primitives.q: I was emotional and decided to act.

primitives.p: So tonight we're announcing that we're going to evolve our giving model.
primitives.q: We're going to give resources to causes.

primitives.p: You know what? Damn it, we're going to do something about it.
primitives.q: I sat there and I thought.

primitives.p: We said, "Let's pass universal background checks."
primitives.q: You can do it in 30 seconds.

openers: Thank you for being on the show.
And I am a fan of Toms.
bridges: But then I couldn't fit "Tomorrows" on this tag.
People call me Tom all the time.
closers: It's gonna be a good day.

Evolving the mission to address bigger issues

title: Toms Founder Blake Mycoskie Announces $5 Million Donation to End Gun Violence
